query: SELECT workspaceId, COUNT(*) as client_count FROM clients GROUP BY workspaceId ORDER BY client_count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ScXmtJuaTeKxeck.a823cb61aea9 --database ZqvPyEVdTkw9DPvc2ezGwV --execute SELECT workspaceId, COUNT(*) as client_count FROM clients GROUP BY workspaceId ORDER BY client_count DESC;
